infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pantry uses your camera to scan your pantry shelves, capture meal photos, and scan grocery barcodes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pantry needs photo access so you can upload meal photos and import grocery receipt images you've already taken.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Pantry saves meal images you generate to your photo library so you can share them later.

plugins.photosPermission: Pantry needs photo access so you can upload meal photos and import grocery receipt images you've already taken.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pantry uses your camera to scan your pantry shelves, capture meal photos, and scan grocery barcodes.
